name: Esri Services Catalog
description: A collection of various Esri ArcGIS Server services.

datasets.name: USA Major Cities Map (Dynamic)
datasets.description: A dynamic map service showing major cities in the USA.

datasets.name: Wildfire Feature Layer (Points)
datasets.description: Feature service representing wildfire locations and perimeters.

datasets.name: Landsat GLS Shaded Relief
datasets.description: Imagery service providing shaded relief from Landsat.

datasets.name: World Street Map (Tiled)
datasets.description: ArcGIS Online World Street Map (tiled map service).

datasets.name: Navigation Vector Tiles (Dark)
datasets.description: Vector tile layer for navigation (dark theme).
